meaning: adj.幽默的,滑稽的,喜开玩笑的
examples: Stop being facetious; this is serious.
The woman eyed him coldly. "Don't be facetious," she said.
Yet there is also an art history of rubbish (and don't forget, facetious remarks are welcome on this blog).
And he leaned over and he continued being facetious, and said, what are you going to sing?
The best thing about Miami is how close it is to the rest of the US. That is only a slightly facetious statement.
